zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Delves於大約1400年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親John De Delves II25歲，母親Phillippa Mainwaring17歲。她於大約1412年與John Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在她的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Delves于大约1400年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲John De Delves II25岁，母亲Phillippa Mainwaring17岁。她于大约1412年与John Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在她的家乡享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Delves was born about 1400, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Delves II, was 25 and her mother, Phillippa Mainwaring, was 17. She married John Mainwaring about 1412, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1490, in her hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Delves est née environ 1400, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Delves II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Phillippa Mainwaring, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Mainwaring environ 1412, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à West Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Delves um 1400 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Delves II 25 und ihre Mutter Phillippa Mainwaring 17. Sie hat um 1412 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 91 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John Mainwaring circa 1412, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Delvesが約1400年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John De Delves IIは25歳，母Phillippa Mainwaringは17歳であった。約1412年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーでJohn Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年に故郷で91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウエスト ペックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Delves(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Delves II(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phillippa Mainwaring(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에서 John Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 펙함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Delves nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Delves II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Phillippa Mainwaring, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Mainwaring aproximadamente 1412, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1490, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em West Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Delves родилась около 1400 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Delves II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillippa Mainwaring, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mainwaring около 1412 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1490 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности вест пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John Mainwaring aproximadamente 1412, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas.
